---
title: "T-Test Results"
format: html
---

```{r}
data <- read.csv("Standardized_Results_T_Tests.csv")
data
```

Independent t-tests

```{r}
# Partiscan Cue Deactivation
t.test(data$Partiscan_Cue_Deactivation_Standardized ~ data$Result, data = data)
```

```{r}
# Leaders Emoting as more human as opposed to politician like
t.test(data$Leaders_Emoting_as_more_human_as_opposed_to_politician_like_Standardized ~ data$Result, data = data)
```

```{r}
# State_and_local_level_focus
t.test(data$State_and_local_level_focus_Standardized ~ data$Result, data = data)
```

```{r}
# National_pride
t.test(data$National_pride_Standardized ~ data$Result, data = data)

```

```{r}
# High dominance politics
t.test(data$High_dominance_politics_Standardized ~ data$Result, data = data)

```

```{r}
# crisis_creibility_managerial_competency
t.test(data$crisis_creibility_managerial_competency_Standardized ~ data$Result, data = data)

```
